    S

    salePrice - Variable in enum class logic.ItemSpriteType
    The cost to purchase this item from the PC.
    Sandwich - Class in logic.menus
    Represents the sandwich menu item.
    Sandwich() - Constructor for class logic.menus.Sandwich
    Constructs a Sandwich with random ingredients.
    Sandwich(ItemSpriteType, ItemSpriteType) - Constructor for class logic.menus.Sandwich
    Constructs a Sandwich with specific ingredients.
    SANDWICH - Enum constant in enum class logic.MenuType
    Enum constant for menu type.
    SATISFACTORY_MEAL - Enum constant in enum class logic.MenuType
    Enum constant for menu type.
    SatisfactoryMeal - Class in logic.menus
    Represents the satisfactory meal menu item.
    SatisfactoryMeal() - Constructor for class logic.menus.SatisfactoryMeal
    Constructs a Satisfactory Meal menu.
    SCREEN_HEIGHT - Static variable in class application.Main
    Height of the game window.
    SCREEN_WIDTH - Static variable in class application.Main
    Width of the game window.
    sequentialTransition - Static variable in class util.DialogManager
    Sequential transition that stores timeline of dialogs.
    ServeCounter - Class in logic.counters
    Counter for serving food orders.
    ServeCounter(double, double, double, double) - Constructor for class logic.counters.ServeCounter
    Constructs a ServeCounter.
    serveOrder(FoodOrder) - Method in class logic.GameInstance
    Serve the order given in parameter.
    If the serve counter has ingredients, it calculates how similar ingredients are
    to the specific order.
    ServingRoom - Class in gui.room
    Serving room UI
    ServingRoom() - Constructor for class gui.room.ServingRoom
    Private constructor for the ServingRoom singleton.
    setAllowChangingRoom(boolean) - Method in class gui.GameScene
    Setter for allow changing room field
    setBakedPercentage(int) - Method in class entity.ingredients.Dough
    Sets the baked percentage of the dough.
    setBgmVolume(double) - Static method in class application.Main
    Setter for the background music volume
    setBoiledPercentage(int) - Method in class entity.ingredients.Dough
    Sets the boiled percentage of the dough.
    setBoiledPercentage(int) - Method in class entity.ingredients.Egg
    Sets the boiled percentage of the egg.
    setBoiledPercentage(int) - Method in class entity.ingredients.Potato
    Sets the boiled percentage of the potato.
    setCurrentRoomIndex(int) - Method in class logic.GameInstance
    Setter method for currentRoomIndex field.
    setEdible(boolean) - Method in class entity.base.BaseIngredient
    Setter for edible field
    setFriedPercentage(int) - Method in class entity.ingredients.Potato
    Sets the fried percentage of the potato.
    setGrilledPercentage(int) - Method in class entity.ingredients.Bacon
    Sets the grilled percentage of the bacon.
    setGrilledPercentage(int) - Method in class entity.ingredients.Egg
    Sets the grilled percentage of the egg.
    setHeight(double) - Method in class logic.counters.BaseCounter
    Sets the height.
    setImageURL(String) - Method in class entity.base.BaseItem
    Setter for the image URL of the item
    setIngredientInStock(ItemSpriteType, int) - Method in class logic.GameInstance
    Setter method for setting item amount in the stock.
    setItem(BaseItem) - Method in class sprites.ItemSprite
    Setter method of item.
    setMaximumDay(int) - Static method in class application.Main
    Setter for maximum day in game
    setMilkSupply(int) - Static method in class logic.counters.IceCreamMachine
    Sets the milk supply.
    setMovable(boolean) - Method in class sprites.ItemSprite
    Sets whether the item sprite is movable.
    setName(String) - Method in class entity.base.BaseItem
    Setter for the name of the item.
    If the name given is blank, item's name is set to "Unknown"
    setName(String) - Method in class logic.menus.BaseMenu
    Setter for the name of the menu.
    setPlayerCash(int) - Method in class logic.GameInstance
    Sets the player's cash to a specific amount.
    setPlayerItemOnHand(ItemSprite) - Method in class logic.GameInstance
    Setter for playerItemOnHand field.
    setPreviousCounter(BaseCounter) - Method in class sprites.ItemSprite
    Sets the previous counter for this item sprite.
    setpX(double) - Method in class logic.counters.BaseCounter
    Sets the center X coordinate.
    setpY(double) - Method in class logic.counters.BaseCounter
    Sets the center Y coordinate.
    setSfxVolume(double) - Static method in class application.Main
    Setter for the sound effect volume
    setSummaryUI(ArrayList<Label>, String, String) - Method in class gui.SummaryMenu
    Helper method to update the summary UI using given info.
    settingsButtonOnClick(MouseEvent) - Method in class gui.MainMenu
    Handles the settings button click event.
    SettingsMenu - Class in gui
    Represents the settings menu UI.
    SettingsMenu() - Constructor for class gui.SettingsMenu
    Constructs the settings menu.
    setToAnchored(double, double) - Method in class sprites.ItemSprite
    Set ItemSprite layout x and layout y such that mouse position relative to ItemSprite is constant.
    setToWithinBound(BaseCounter) - Method in class sprites.ItemSprite
    Set ItemSprite layout x and layout y such that ItemSprite contains within bound of a BaseCounter.
    setWidth(double) - Method in class logic.counters.BaseCounter
    Sets the width.
    SFXManager - Class in util
    Manages sound effects in the game.
    SFXManager() - Constructor for class util.SFXManager
    Default constructor for SFXManager.
    sfxVolume - Static variable in class application.Main
    Volume for sound effects.
    skip() - Static method in class util.DialogManager
    Skips the current dialog sequence.
    skipToLast() - Method in class util.wrapper.BackgroundMusicTrack
    Skip to the last music of the track
    sleep() - Method in class gui.GameScene
    Open sleep confirmation panel
    SLICED_BREAD - Enum constant in enum class logic.ItemSpriteType
    Enum constant for item sprite type.
    SlicedBread - Class in entity.ingredients
    Represents sliced bread ingredient.
    SlicedBread() - Constructor for class entity.ingredients.SlicedBread
    Constructs a new Sliced Bread ingredient.
    slicingText(String) - Static method in class util.DialogManager
    Slices the original text into processable chunks for the dialog system.
    slideTransition(WalkDirection) - Method in class gui.GameScene
    Performs a slide transition to the next room in the given direction.
    soiBlinking - Variable in class gui.MainMenu
    The animated sprite for Soi.
    soiBlinkingURL - Static variable in class gui.MainMenu
    The URL for the blinking Soi sprite sheet.
    soiFaceImage - Variable in class gui.TutorialScene
    The image view displaying Soi's face expression in the dialog.
    sound - Variable in class util.wrapper.SoundEffect
    The audio clip for the sound effect.
    SoundEffect - Class in util.wrapper
    Wrapper class for AudioClip to conveniently control its volume.
    SoundEffect(String) - Constructor for class util.wrapper.SoundEffect
    Constructs a new SoundEffect from the specified file name.
    Spaghetti - Class in logic.menus
    Represents the spaghetti menu item.
    Spaghetti() - Constructor for class logic.menus.Spaghetti
    Constructs a Spaghetti menu.
    SPAGHETTI - Enum constant in enum class logic.MenuType
    Enum constant for menu type.
    sprites - package sprites
    Contains classes responsible for rendering and animating 2D sprites.
    StageManager - Class in util
    Manages stage transitions.
    StageManager() - Constructor for class util.StageManager
    Default constructor for StageManager.
    start(Stage) - Method in class application.Main
    Initialize the game application
    startTimer() - Method in class logic.GameInstance
    Start and handling timer.
    startTrack() - Method in class util.wrapper.BackgroundMusicTrack
    Starts playing the music track from the first song.
    stop() - Method in class util.wrapper.SoundEffect
    Stops the sound effect.
    stopAnimation() - Method in class sprites.AnimatedSprite
    Stops the currently playing animation.
    stopTrack() - Method in class util.wrapper.BackgroundMusicTrack
    Stops the currently playing music track.
    StoveCounter - Class in logic.counters
    Counter for grilling ingredients.
    StoveCounter(double, double, double, double) - Constructor for class logic.counters.StoveCounter
    Constructs a StoveCounter.
    STRAWBERRY - Enum constant in enum class entity.IceCreamFlavor
    Strawberry flavor.
    stylesheetURL - Static variable in class gui.GameScene
    The URL to the stylesheet for the GameScene UI.
    styleSheetURL - Static variable in class gui.MainMenu
    The URL for the main menu stylesheet.
    styleSheetURL - Static variable in class gui.SettingsMenu
    The URL for the settings menu stylesheet.
    summaryGrid - Variable in class gui.SummaryMenu
    GridPane contains all the summary information.
    SummaryMenu - Class in gui
    Represents the summary menu UI.
    SummaryMenu() - Constructor for class gui.SummaryMenu
    Constructs the summary menu.
    switchScene(Parent) - Static method in class util.StageManager
    Switches the primary scene root using a node reference.
